leadText: The Razor Claw (Japanese: するどいツメ Razor Claw) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows Sneasel to evolve into Weavile or Sneasler, and also increases the holder's critical hit ratio.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Raises the critical hit ratio of the holder by one stage. Outside battles [ edit | edit source ] Causes Johtonian Sneasel to evolve into Weavile when leveled up at night , and Hisuian Sneasel to evolve into Sneasler when leveled up during the day , both while holding it. This consumes the Razor Claw.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Lunar Ribbon and Razor Claw at Luminous Spring , Sneasel can be evolved into Weavile . This consumes the Lunar Ribbon and Razor Claw. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Razor Claw is required to evolve certain Pokémon in Pokémon Sleep. It is consumed upon use. Sneasel requires 80 Sneasel Candy and a Razor Claw to evolve into Weavile .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Raises the critical hit ratio of the holder by one stage.
